title: Documentation Lacks Clarity on Environment Isolation
description: The documentation does not clearly state the importance of environment isolation during ingestion and promotion processes.

root_cause_potential: Insufficient documentation of environment isolation requirements
Missing emphasis on data separation between environments
Unclear guidance on preventing environment data bleed
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Update documentation to emphasize the need for environment isolation to prevent data bleed

reproduction_steps: 1. Review current documentation for environment isolation guidance
2. Check promote command documentation for isolation warnings
3. Verify ingestion documentation mentions environment separation
4. Look for explicit warnings about data bleed prevention
expected_behavior: Documentation should clearly emphasize environment isolation importance and provide explicit guidance
actual_behavior: Documentation lacks clear emphasis on environment isolation and data bleed prevention

immediate_fixes.action: Add environment isolation section to promote command documentation
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure users understand the critical importance of environment separation

immediate_fixes.action: Include explicit warnings about data bleed risks
Add safety checklist for environment operations
immediate_fixes.rationale: Provide actionable guidance for safe environment management

impact_assessment.user_impact: Low - Documentation clarity issue, no direct functional impact
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Low - Affects user understanding and safety practices
impact_assessment.urgency: Low - Should be addressed in next documentation update
